_meta.description: Domain-aware document archetypes with structure signatures.

archetypes.description: Sources and uses of cash over time
Planned budget by period and owner
Financial release with KPIs and commentary
Platform service terms and usage policy
Clinical claim request and adjudication metadata
Gas utility and service fee statement
Road toll or tag transaction bill
Internal controls narrative and compliance statements.
Management certification letter for financial assertions.
Loan account balance and payment history
